## Biography

Lady Zi is a rogue pirate admiral and the suspected leader of a criminal syndicate that conducted coordinated attacks on military installations and starport facilities in the core systems during 3312. Her true identity remains unknown, with underworld sources unwilling to divulge information about her origins or motives.
